codeReview.summary: The feature successfully updated all 15 frontend test files to use email-based authentication instead of username. The test helper (tests/helpers/auth.js) and all 14 test spec files were updated to: change function parameters from 'username' to 'email', replace uniqueUsername() with uniqueEmail(), update request payloads to send {email} instead of {username}, update assertions to check .user.email instead of .user.username, and change input selectors from input[type="text"] to input[type="email"]. The AuthEntry.svelte and auth.js source files were already updated by a previous feature (auth-migrate-username-to-email, commit 1150c04) and correctly use email input with type="email", autocomplete="email", and email validation.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The frontend-worker skill mentions 'pnpm run lint' as a verification step, but the project's package.json has no lint script. The worker correctly noted this in skillFeedback.suggestedChanges. The skill should either note that lint may not be available, or the project should add a lint script.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback.suggestedChanges: 'The frontend-worker skill mentions pnpm run lint as a verification step, but the project has no lint script in package.json.'

sharedStateObservations.observation: The AGENTS.md file documents the frontend auth patterns but still references 'username' in some places. It should be updated to reflect the email-based auth that is now implemented.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md line in frontend-auth-entry.md: 'The AuthEntry component dispatches an authbegin event with { username, type }' - should be { email, type }

sharedStateObservations.observation: The feature dependency chain was correctly handled: auth-migrate-username-to-email (backend + frontend source) was completed first (commit 1150c04), then frontend-auth-email-input (test updates) followed. The handoff correctly identified that source files were already updated.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Git log shows 1150c04 'Migrate auth from username to email-based authentication' preceded 33e64fb 'Update frontend test files to use email instead of username for auth'

summary: Feature 'frontend-auth-email-input' is COMPLETE and READY for user testing. All 15 test files updated correctly with no remaining username references. Source files (AuthEntry.svelte, auth.js) were already updated by prior feature. Build passes, Go tests pass. No blocking issues.
